column2: A {{c1::cable stripper}} removes a cable's outer jacket before termination.
column3: The goal is to expose the conductors without damaging them.
column4:
Exam Trap

The stripper prepares the cable; a crimper or punchdown tool performs the termination.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.20; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.8
column9: A+::220-1201::2.8 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::NetworkingTools Cloze CableStripper CablePreparation Source::Messer-v170

column2: A {{c1::loopback plug}} returns a port's transmitted signal to its receive side for local physical-port testing.
column3: Loopback plugs can be made for different physical interfaces and are not crossover cables.
column4:
Why

Returning the signal lets a technician test the local port path without a remote endpoint.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.20; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.8
